title: Test telemetry capture in runners
description: Verify that AgentRunResult.telemetry field works correctly and that both runners populate telemetry. Test backward compatibility (telemetry defaults to None). Verify ClaudeCodeAgentRunner extracts all provider fields from a mock JSON response envelope. Verify CodexAgentRunner populates minimal telemetry. Verify wall-clock duration is positive. Verify prompt_chars and prompt_lines are correct.
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify AgentRunResult.telemetry defaults to None
Tests verify ClaudeCodeAgentRunner populates all expected telemetry fields
Tests verify CodexAgentRunner populates duration_ms, prompt_chars, prompt_lines, source
Tests verify duration_ms is a positive integer
All new and existing tests pass
